scripts.build:shared: echo 'Shared package is consumed via path aliases'
scripts.build:shopalize: cd shopalize && npm run build 2>/dev/null || echo 'Shopalize build skipped'
scripts.build:watchtower: cd watchtower && npm run build 2>/dev/null || echo 'Watchtower build skipped'
scripts.build:all: npm run build:ripplify && npm run build:admin && npm run build:shopalize && npm run build:watchtower
scripts.deploy:nginx: sudo cp nginx/ecosystem.conf /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/ && sudo nginx -t && sudo systemctl reload nginx
scripts.deploy:all: npm run build:all && npm run pm2:reload
